title: Binary Confusion
description:
Binary encoding represents data using only 0s and 1s.

Your task: Decode the following binary message:

01100010 01101001 01101110 01100001 01110010 01111001 01011111 01110010 01110101 01101100 01100101 01110011
hints: Only two different digits appear in this message
Each group of 8 digits represents a single character
Use 'From Binary' in CyberChef — each 8-bit chunk maps directly to an ASCII letter
